# Birat Gautam Blog Full Context

> Expanded context view for AI assistants. Includes article metadata plus content excerpts.

## When Agents Should Not Decide: Building Confidence Thresholds for Human Handoff

- URL: https://birat.codes/blog/agent-confidence-thresholds
- Published: 2026-04-16
- Updated: 2026-04-16
- Author: Birat Gautam
- Topic: Agentic AI
- Tags: Agentic AI, Human-AI Collaboration, Risk Management

Agents need explicit rejection regions and must know their limits. Appropriate autonomy beats unlimited autonomy. Learn to build confidence thresholds that keep humans in the loop.

- URL: https://birat.codes/blog/agent-observability
- Published: 2026-04-16
- Updated: 2026-04-16
- Author: Birat Gautam
- Topic: Agentic AI
- Tags: Agentic AI, Observability, Production Systems

Agent observability requires reasoning traces, not just logs. You need to see why the agent acted, not just what it did.

## The Hallucination Budget: Quantifying Risk for Mission-Critical Agents

- URL: https://birat.codes/blog/hallucination-budget
- Published: 2026-04-16
- Updated: 2026-04-16
- Author: Birat Gautam
- Topic: Agentic AI
- Tags: Agentic AI, Risk Management, Production Systems

Hallucinations aren't random. They're predictable under specific input conditions. Here's how to quantify your cost-of-correction and build agents that fail safely.

## Agents in the Loop: Designing for Human-AI Collaboration Instead of Replacement

- URL: https://birat.codes/blog/human-ai-collaboration
- Published: 2026-04-16
- Updated: 2026-04-16
- Author: Birat Gautam
- Topic: Agentic AI
- Tags: Agentic AI, Human-AI Collaboration, UX Design

The best production agents augment human expertise, not replace it. This requires different architecture: partial tasks, confidence signals, and designed interruption points.

## The Latency Trap: Why 99th-Percentile Response Time Matters More Than Average

- URL: https://birat.codes/blog/latency-percentiles
- Published: 2026-04-16
- Updated: 2026-04-16
- Author: Birat Gautam
- Topic: Agentic AI
- Tags: Agentic AI, Performance, Production Systems

Agentic latency isn't Gaussian—it's multimodal and heavy-tailed. User experience is determined by percentiles, not averages.
